name: Flank Steak Mephisto
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the steak on a cutting board and make shallow diagonal cuts with the point of a sharp knife.
2. Continue making shallow cuts about ½ inch apart, then make cuts in the opposite direction so the surface of the steak is scored in a diamond crisscross pattern.
3. Turn the steak over and repeat on the opposite side. This helps cut through the surface fibers, prevents the steak from curling as it cooks, and makes slicing easier. Be careful not to cut too deeply.
4. Spread both sides of the steak with the combination of mustard, worcestershire sauce, soy, and minced garlic (if desired).
5. Spread peppercorns evenly over one side of the steak (if desired).
6. To crush peppercorns, place them in a plastic bag and gently hit with a hammer or other sturdy object until they are very coarsely cracked (the texture should be much coarser than commercially available ground pepper).
7. Broil, barbecue, or pan-fry the steak in a nonstick skillet sprayed with cooking spray, peppercorn side down first, to your desired doneness (about 4-6 minutes per side depending on thickness).
